title: athyrium spinulosum
intro: Athyrium spinulosum, also known as the spiny lady fern, is a species of fern native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Athyrium spinulosum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
intro_study: According to "Journal of traditional and complementary medicine", athyrium spinulosum has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including pain, specifically breast pain during childbirth, to increase milk flow, and as an antiparasitic, anthelmintic, and carminative.
